titleStmt.title: SII 5.662: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 662. (A.R. No. 101 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉacakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkolottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 5vatu tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku Uḷvarippaṭi coḻamaṇṭalattu Īśvarastā naṅkaḷil munnūṟṟaṟupatu koyilukku koyilāl nilam ve
liyāka Iṭa tiruvāymoḻin=ta ruḷiṉa nila munnūṟṟaṟupatiṟṟu velikku Uṭalākak kunṟakkūṟṟamāṉa Uttuṅkatuṅkavaḷanāṭṭuc ciṟupaḻuvūrt tiruvālan tuṟai Uṭaiyārkku veṇṭum niman=ta ṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāṉa puvaṉamuḻatu
ṭaivaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu kaṇṭarātittaccaruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai karuṇākaraṉallū(r)ril Iṭukiṟa nilattukku Ūrkkaṇakkuc cemaṅkalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi tiruvaraṅkavatikkuk kiḻakku 1- catirattum(k) kontakkamātevivāykkā
lukku vaṭakku A-ṅkaṇṇāṟṟuExpressed by a symbol.1- catirattuṅ kaṇṭarātittavatikkuk kiḻakku Aṟiñciya vāykkālukku vaṭakku 1 catirattuExpressed by a symbol.4- ntuṇṭattum Ivvatikku vaṭakku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu 1 catirattum [2�] 2- ñcatirattum 3� 2- ñcatirat tum[ 3- kaṇṇāṟṟuExpressed by a symbol.3- catirattum I] ṭukiṟa nilam mun Iṟai kaṭṭiṉa(p)
paṭi tavirn tu yāṇṭu 5vatu pacāṉmutal � Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa tarampeṟṟa nilamnta3yama� kiḻakku I taramili nilattum Uḷḷaḷa vaḷakkak kuṟain=ta nilattu Opāti nilam�4 kiḻakku I Āka nilam 1- li� nila Opāti paḻaviṟai I 2 10 6 � kiḻakkun=ta niccayitta nilattāl nilam 6 �
3� niccayittilāta nilattāl paḻaviṟai Opāti I 2 10 6�7 Āka I vam � tara Opāti paḻaviṟai I 3 10 7� 3 niccayitta nilattāl I kkarū niccayittilāta nilattāl paḻaviṟai I 2 10 8 ḷa 3 10 2 Āka I 2 10
� Ippaṭi tavira yāṇṭu 5vatu pacāṉamutal veli 1- kku [i 100- ḷaṉ Āka Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭan I 100- ḷaṉ pattāṟākki I 6 10 7 yāṇṭu 5vatu pacāṉmutal tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili Iṭṭamaikku Ivai puravavari cikaraṇanā
yakam ponnūḻā ṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari cikaraṇanāyakam Iḷaṅkārikuṭaiyā(na) ṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari cikaraṇanāyakam pantaṇainallū(r)ruṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari cikaraṇanāyakam vāṇaka ṉeḻuttu Ivai
puravuvari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi tañcāvūrkiḻava ṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi teṅkūruṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi vaṭakaiyuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari cikaraṇattu mu
kaveṭṭi talaināruṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu Ivai Ilāṭattaraiya ṉeḻuttu Ivai vayanāṭṭaraiya ṉeḻuttu Ivai kaḷappāḷarāja ṉeḻuttu panmā heśvara ra kṣai .. Inṉilam Iṭuvittār Araḷan pāranayar .
Digital edition of SII 5.662 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
